---
title: "Day 02 - pictorgram"
format: html
---

## Prompt / Topic

pictogram

## Kick-off Example

```{r}
# helper function 
create_data <- function(region, on_time, slight, extreme) {
  data.frame(
    region = region,
    category = c(
      rep("On time", on_time),
      rep("Slight", slight),
      rep("Extreme", extreme)
    )
  )
}
# Dados baseados no relatório
brazil <- create_data("Brazil", 62, 26, 12)
europe <- create_data("Europe", 48, 27, 25)

df <- bind_rows(brazil, europe)

df <- df |>
  group_by(region) |>
  mutate(
    id = row_number(),
    x = (id - 1) %% 10,
    y = 10 - ((id - 1) %/% 10)
  )

colors <- c(
  "On time" = "#00FF66",
  "Slight" = "#FFD700",
  "Extreme" = "#FF3B30"
)

ggplot(df, aes(x = x, y = y, label = "✈️", color = category)) +
  geom_text(size = 10) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  facet_wrap(~region) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#2b2b2b", color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#2b2b2b", color = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(color = "white", size = 16)
  )
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(showtext)

# Add Font Awesome fonts
font_add('fa-solid', 'fontawesome/otfs/Font Awesome 7 Free-Solid-900.otf')
showtext_auto()

# helper function 
create_data <- function(region, on_time, slight, extreme) {
  data.frame(
    region = region,
    category = c(
      rep("On time", on_time),
      rep("Slight", slight),
      rep("Extreme", extreme)
    )
  )
}

# Dados baseados no relatório
brazil <- create_data("Brazil", 62, 26, 12)
europe <- create_data("Europe", 48, 27, 25)
df <- bind_rows(brazil, europe)

df <- df |>
  group_by(region) |>
  mutate(
    id = row_number(),
    x = (id - 1) %% 10,
    y = 10 - ((id - 1) %/% 10),
    label = "\uf072"  # Font Awesome plane icon
  )

colors <- c(
  "On time" = "#00FF66",
  "Slight" = "#FFD700",
  "Extreme" = "#FF3B30"
)

ggplot(df, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, color = category)) +
  geom_text(size = 6, family = "fa-solid") +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  facet_wrap(~region) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#2b2b2b", color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#2b2b2b", color = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(color = "white", size = 16, family = "sans"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(color = "white", size = 12),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#2b2b2b", color = NA)
  )
```

## Data Prep

```{}
bra_punc_url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/euctrl-pru/international-BRA-EUR-2025/refs/heads/main/data/BRA-punc.csv"

bra_punc <- readr::read_csv(bra_punc_url, show_col_types = FALSE) |> 
# correct (minimal impact) renamed colums
  rename("(-20,-15]" = "(-20,-16]","(-15,-10]" = "(-16,-10]") |> 
  filter(year(DATE) == 2024)

bra_punc |> readr::write_csv("./data/BRA-punc-2024.csv")

# European data
# ----- note: there is a separate file for LPPT as we changed airports in 2025

url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/euctrl-pru/international-BRA-EUR-2025/main/data/PBWG-EUR-PUNC-2024.csv"
url_lppt <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/euctrl-pru/international-BRA-EUR-2025/main/data/PBWG-EUR-PUNC-LPPT-2019-2024.csv"

eur_punc      <- read_csv(url,      show_col_types = FALSE)
eur_punc_lppt <- read_csv(url_lppt, show_col_types = FALSE)

eur_punc <- eur_punc |> bind_rows(eur_punc_lppt) |> 
  filter(year(DATE) == 2024) |> 
  # trim to 10 comparison airports of last year
  filter(! ICAO %in% c("LIRF","LTFM"))

eur_punc |> rename(APT = ICAO) |> readr::write_csv("./data/EUR-punc-2024.csv")
```


## Viz

```{r}
# load data
punc <- fs::dir_ls("data", regexp = "-punc-2024") |> 
  purrr::map(.f = ~ readr::read_csv(.x, show_col_types = FALSE)) |> 
  dplyr::bind_rows()

# aggregate by year
punc <- punc |> mutate(REGION = case_when(
   grepl("^S", APT)   ~ "BRA"
  ,grepl("^E|L", APT) ~ "EUR"
  ,.default = NA
)) |> 
  group_by(APT, PHASE, YEAR = lubridate::year(DATE), REGION, N_VALID) |> 
  reframe(across(.cols = `(-INF,-60]`:`[60,INF)`, .fns = sum))

# helper functions to aggregate the data
add_dly_early_late_groupings <- function(.punc_df){
  df <- .punc_df |>  
    dplyr::mutate(
        EARLY        = rowSums(across(.cols = `(-INF,-60]`:`(-20,-15]`), na.rm = TRUE)
      , WITHIN_M15P15= (`(-15,-10]`+`(-10,-5]`+`(-5,0]`+`(0,5)`+`[5,10)`+`[10,15)`)
      , LATE_P15P45  = rowSums(across(.cols = `[15,20)`:`[40,45)`), na.rm = TRUE)    
      , LATE_P45P99  = rowSums(across(.cols = `[45,50)`:`[60,INF)`), na.rm = TRUE)
      )
}

add_dly_early_late_groupings <- function(.punc_df){
  df <- .punc_df |>  
    dplyr::mutate(
      EARLY        = rowSums(across(.cols = `(-INF,-60]`:`(-20,-15]`), na.rm = TRUE)
      ,EARLY_M15M05 = (`(-15,-10]` + `(-10,-5]`)
      ,EARLY_M05M00 =  `(-5,0]`                 
      ,LATE_P00P05  =  `(0,5)`                   
      ,LATE_P05P15  = (`[5,10)` + `[10,15)`)     
      ,LATE         = rowSums(across(.cols = `[15,20)`:`[60,INF)`), na.rm = TRUE) 
      ,WITHIN_M05P05= (`(-5,0]` + `(0,5)`)
      ,WITHIN_M15P15= (`(-15,-10]`+`(-10,-5]`+`(-5,0]`+`(0,5)`+`[5,10)`+`[10,15)`)
    )
}

punc2 <- punc |> add_dly_early_late_groupings() |> 
  select(REGION, EARLY:LATE) |> 
  group_by(REGION) |> 
  reframe(N = n(), across(.cols = EARLY:LATE, .fns = ~ sum(.x))) |> 
  mutate(N_VALID = rowSums(across(EARLY:LATE)))
```


wide to long

```{r}
#helper for plot table format -- long format
delay_long <- punc2 |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = EARLY:LATE,
    names_to = "category",
    values_to = "share"
  )

```


Totals

```{r}
SCALE <- 25000

df_total <- delay_long |>
  mutate(
    n_icons = round(share / SCALE)
  ) |>
  uncount(n_icons) |>
  group_by(REGION) |>
  mutate(
    id = row_number(),
    x = (id - 1) %% 10,
    y = 10 - ((id - 1) %/% 10),
    label = "\uf072"
  ) |>
  ungroup()

df_avg <- delay_long |>
  mutate(
    share = share / N_VALID,
    n_icons = round(share * 100)
  ) |>
  uncount(n_icons) |>
  group_by(REGION) |>
  mutate(
    id = row_number(),
    x = (id - 1) %% 10,
    y = 10 - ((id - 1) %/% 10),
    label = "\uf072"
  ) |>
  ungroup()

```

our colors

```{r}
our_colors <- c(
  EARLY           = "#4DA6FF",  # early = blue
  EARLY_M15M05    = "#80C1FF",  # lighter blue
  EARLY_M05M00    = "#00FF66",  # punctual green
  LATE_P00P05     = "#00FF66",  # same punctual green
  LATE_P05P15     = "#FFB000",  # amber
  LATE            = "#FF3B30"   # late = red
)

payload <- df_total
payload <- df_avg

payload <- payload |> mutate(angle = ifelse(REGION == "BRA", 0, 180))

# mapping old labels to new ones
label_mapping <- c("BRA" = "Brazil", "EUR" = "Europe")

p <- ggplot(payload, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, color = category, angle = angle)) +
  geom_text(size = 28, family = "fa-solid") +
  scale_color_manual(values = our_colors) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0.1,0.1)) +    # squish plotarea - which is 10  x 10
  facet_wrap(~REGION, labeller = labeller(REGION = label_mapping)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(panel.spacing = unit(1, "cm"))
  
fabio_theme <- theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#2b2b2b", color = NA),
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#2b2b2b", color = NA),
    strip.text       = element_text(color = "white", size = 16),
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    legend.text      = element_text(color = "white", size = 12),
    legend.title     = element_blank(),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#2b2b2b", color = NA)
  )

p + fabio_theme
```


```{r}
library(ggtext)

our_title <-"Chart-Challenge Day 02 – Pictogram of Average Punctuality at the study airports in Brazil and Europe"
our_sub <-
  "There is a higher share of early movements (blue) in Brazil versus a higher share of late movements in Europe."
our_caption <-
  "DECEA Performance Section & EUROCONTROL PRU — data provided as part of a study available for download on GitHub."



day02 <- p + fabio_theme +
  labs(title = our_title, subtitle = our_sub, caption = our_caption) +
  theme(base_size = 16
    , plot.title      = element_textbox_simple(
                                  width = unit(0.98, "npc"),   # 👈 90% of plot width  
                                  ,lineheight = 0.2
                                  ,color = "white", size = rel(6), face = "bold"
                                  ,margin = margin(b = 15)
                                  )
        ,plot.title.position = "plot"
        ,plot.subtitle = element_textbox_simple(color = "white", size = rel(4)
                                                ,width = unit(0.98, "npc")
                                                ,margin = margin(b = 30)
                                                )
        ,plot.caption = element_text(color = "white", size = rel(3))
        ,strip.text = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10, b = 10), size = rel(4), face = "bold"),  # margin in points
    # Optional: adjust strip background
    ,strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#2b2b2b", color = "black")
    ,strip.placement = "inside"
    # Adjust panel spacing between facets
#    , panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines")
        ,legend.position = "none"
        ,plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10) # Increase margins (top, right, bottom, left)
        ) 

day02 +
  canvas(width = 12, height = 8, unit = "in", dpi = 300)

```


```{r}
library(ggview)

day02 +
  canvas(width = 12, height = 8, unit = "in")
```
